title: chloranthus angustifolius
intro: Chloranthus angustifolius is a species of flowering plant in the family Chloranthaceae, commonly known as the Chinese parasol or narrow-leaved chloranthus. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chloranthus angustifolius include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers to be used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement.
